passiveAbilities.name: Weakling
passiveAbilities.description: Reduce all Melee Dmg this character deals by -1. Harvest actions cost this model +1 energy

activeAbilities.name: Faerie Tricks
activeAbilities.description: Swap places with target friendly Rogue.

arcaneAbilities.name: Acid Flask
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target suffers X+1 Magical Dmg.
Catastrophe: This model suffers 2 Wds.

arcaneAbilities.name: Drop of Nightshade
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target enemy loses X energy.
Target enemy suffers X Wds.
Move target enemy up to 2X”. Then you may have the target take a Melee Attack action controlled by you. They count as friendly during the Melee attack action.
Catastrophe: The target and this character are both slain.

signatureMove.name: Drop of Delirium
signatureMove.endStepEffect: Move the enemy model 2”, then it loses 1 energy and suffers 1 Wd.
